items.name_en: 🎉【New】Model 837466 This new Gucci SoftBit shoulder bag reimagines the brand's classic accessory with an oversized half-horsebit silhouette. The casual shape features a magnetic closure and is crafted from richly textured soft grained leather, combining aesthetic appeal with practical function.

items.name_en: 【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag The new Gucci Blondie bag features the brand's iconic series motif, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style to perfectly interpret classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is selected from glossy leather and comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47 to 57cm high); length adjustable between 110cm and 130cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits o max/us, airds, long and lip models.
items.name_cn:
【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag The new Gucci Blondie bag features the brand's iconic series motif, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style to perfectly interpret classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is selected from glossy leather and comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47 to 57cm high); length adjustable between 110cm and 130cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits o max/us, airds, long and lip models.
Model: 820429.
Dimensions: 21(W) x 15.5(H) x 8cm(D)
Color: Black full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder
items.name_cn:
【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from glossy leather and features an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47-57 cm height); length adjustable between 110 cm and 130 cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits iPhone Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet and lipstick.
Model: 820429.
Size: 21 (W) x 15.5 (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Burgundy full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: Brand Selected GG Mini Bag inspired by the styling of Gucci's iconic travel bag. Crafted from canvas, this bag features striped webbing handles and a detachable shoulder strap, reinterpreting classic brand elements and paying tribute to the brand's long heritage in luggage.
items.name_cn:
Brand Selected GG Mini Bag inspired by the styling of Gucci's iconic travel bag. Crafted from canvas, this bag features striped webbing handles and a detachable shoulder strap, reinterpreting classic brand elements and paying tribute to the brand's long heritage in luggage.
Beige and brown GG canvas
Brown leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Handle (10cm high)
Detachable adjustable leather shoulder strap (50cm high; length: 101.5cm)
Zipper closure
Model: 859975.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 13cm (H) x 13cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.4kg
Color: Apricot canvas/Brown.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a cotton webbing lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
items.name_cn:
2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a cotton webbing lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
Black GG embossed leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Black cotton-linen blend lining
Top handle with hook closure (height: 14 cm)
Also features a D-ring for hanging removable items
Interior: two compartments and a central snap-button compartment
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap (height: 52 cm - 57.5 cm; length: 107 cm - 114 cm)
Magnetic snap-button closure
Model: 815118.
Dimensions: 19 cm (W) x 18 cm (H) x 11 cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.45 kg
Color: Black embossed/Original leather.
Made in Italy
